basics.name: Quoc PHAN
basics.label: Java + Angular technical leader
basics.summary: I have been working as a Java backend developer for 12 years, and during that time, I have gained extensive experience in developing and maintaining enterprise web applications using Restful API and JMS. I also have 5 years of experience as a Technical leader. In addition to my backend expertise, I am proficient in modern front-end frameworks like Angular. My technical background has equipped me with the ability to learn new things quickly and solve problems effectively. I am also a good communicator, which helps me collaborate well with other team members.

work.summary: Deveryloc is an automatic system that processes geolocation in real-time. Initially, I worked as a senior full-stack developer but later became the technical leader and scrum master. I built the micro frontend architecture and the local Docker for the development environment. We also migrated the application from GWT to Angular and from monolithic to microservices in the backend
work.name: Deveryloc
work.position: Technical Leader / Scrum master  at Serdao

work.summary: Sedex advance is a web application which is used for managing the audit process, customer companies, and audit companies' information. The application consists of multiple microservices that communicate with each other via RESTful web services and rabbitMQ. My role involved designing and developing the RESTful APIs.
work.name: Sedex advance
work.position: Senior Java Developer  at FPT software

work.name: NLU – Nature Language Understanding
work.summary: NLU is the main part of voice application products whose end users can use their voices to interact with. NLU project is responsible for analyzing the voice input and sending back the search results. I applied the Spring framework to the legacy project and wrote UT to cover the codes

work.name: AXA – Solaris upgrade
work.summary: Customer system needs to be upgraded to the new version of Guidewire in order to use the new features and fix some bugs. For the customer’s customization, we have to upgrade by ourselves and ensure that the business will be the same in 2 versions. We upgrade the system from Guidewire 6 to Guidewire 8 and fixing bug after the migration
